owner_facing_goal: Turn the Google Drive mc/pic/玄岳镇山剑.png reference into an independently registered, visually distinct MyVillage sword with ordinary vanilla diamond-sword behavior.

creative_tab.ordering: Immediately after myvillage:qingfeng_sword and before myvillage:chilian_lihuo_sword.

behavior.server_client_boundary: Use the unmodified Minecraft/NeoForge SwordItem path. No custom payload is registered or sent; normal logical-server attack, damage, enchantment, repair, mining, and durability authority remains unchanged.
behavior.interaction: Ordinary vanilla left-click melee and sword block interaction only. The item remains unsupported by MyVillage cultivation combat, including while the stored combat preference is cultivation. It has no right-click behavior.
behavior.cooldown_or_durability: Match the mapped vanilla diamond sword: durability 1561, held attack damage 7.0, held attack speed 1.6, ordinary attack cooldown, durability, Mending, enchantment, and anvil-repair behavior, with no custom cooldown.
tests: Registration and creative-tab ordering match this contract
The item model uses minecraft:item/handheld with layer0 myvillage:item/xuanyue_zhenshan_sword
The output texture is a 64x64 RGBA PNG whose alpha values are only 0 or 255, and both en_us and zh_cn contain the declared lang key
Diamond-tier durability, attack damage, attack speed, enchantment value, repair ingredient, and vanilla swords-tag membership match the mapped vanilla diamond sword
The item is absent from BasicSwordStyle supported weapon ids and all Qingfeng-only PAL, input interception, payload, combat-session, and first-person renderer guards

commands: In a real client, inspect inventory, first-person, and third-person appearance and exercise ordinary melee, durability, enchantment, repair, and block interaction; leave unobserved surfaces not_verified
jar_checks: assets/myvillage/textures/item/xuanyue_zhenshan_sword.png is a 64x64 RGBA PNG with binary alpha
item.myvillage.xuanyue_zhenshan_sword is present in assets/myvillage/lang/en_us.json and assets/myvillage/lang/zh_cn.json

docs.no_op_reason: The item adds only ordinary creative-tab and vanilla /give acquisition; it introduces no command implementation, recipe, special mechanic, or new acceptance workflow.

non_goals: Crafting recipe, loot acquisition, natural generation, or advancement hook
Different stats or balance tiers among the three reference swords
Skill, special ability, right-click use, projectile, area attack, or cultivation resource cost
PAL-specific animation, Qingfeng first-person transform, five-move cultivation combo support, combat session, or custom network payload
Client-authored hit, damage, timing, target, position, velocity, durability, or cooldown state
Rideable flying-sword behavior or changes to myvillage:qingfeng_sword
